# Advanced client-server interaction tests

# Set aggressive timeouts for this test
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=3s

# Start time server for more complex testing
mcp-server-start time-server go run examples/servers/mcp-time-server/main.go

# Wait for server to be ready
[mcp_server_running]

# Initialize with full capabilities
mcp-server-send time-server '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 1, "method": "initialize", "params": {"protocolVersion": "2024-11-05", "capabilities": {"tools": {}, "resources": {}}, "clientInfo": {"name": "advanced-test-client", "version": "1.0.0"}}}'

# Verify initialization response
stdout 'capabilities'
stdout 'tools'

# Send initialized notification
mcp-server-send time-server '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "method": "notifications/initialized"}'

# List all tools
mcp-server-send time-server '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 2, "method": "tools/list"}'

# Should see time-related tools
stdout 'current_time'

# Get current time
mcp-server-send time-server '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 3, "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "current_time", "arguments": {}}}'

# Verify time response
stdout 'result'

# Test timezone functionality if available
mcp-server-send time-server '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 4, "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "current_time", "arguments": {"timezone": "UTC"}}}'

# Should get UTC time
stdout 'result'

# Test resources if supported
mcp-server-send time-server '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 5, "method": "resources/list"}'

# May or may not have resources - either response is valid
stdout 'result' 'error'

# Stop the server gracefully
mcp-server-stop time-server
